emails.subject: Re: nymex
emails.body: Re: nymex i would be happy to meet with him, but i need to know exactly when because my september schedule is pretty ugly. we have talked with rappaport about their eNymex project, but they do seem to be struggling for strategy. it is really surprising that they lost money. how did it happen? volume couldn't have been down, given all the volatility.

emails.subject: nymex
emails.body: thought you would find this article and quote interesting. phil ``What's the difference between AT&T and NYMEX? Xerox?'' he asked. ``All these businesses are sunset industries.'' former nymex chairman <URL>
